entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART AGRICULTURE (CSA)
entities.description: Agricultural technologies and practices designed to increase productivity, enhance resilience, and reduce greenhouse gas emissions

entities.name: TELANGANA
entities.description: A state in the semi-arid region of India where the study was conducted

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where Telangana state is located

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL INCOME
entities.description: The financial return generated from crop production

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A climate condition characterized by a deficiency of precipitation

entities.name: NORMAL WEATHER
entities.description: Weather conditions that do not deviate significantly from the long-term average

entities.name: MOTAD MODEL
entities.description: A model used to analyze the trade-offs between expected agricultural income and its deviation

entities.name: COST OF CULTIVATION
entities.description: The total expenditure incurred by farmers for crop production

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of growing crops for agricultural yield

entities.name: FARMERS' TRADITIONAL PRACTICES (FTPS)
entities.description: Conventional agricultural methods used by farmers prior to the adoption of CSA

entities.name: PRODUCTION RISK
entities.description: The variability and uncertainty in crop yields and income

entities.name: FARM PONDS
entities.description: A climate-smart water harvesting technology used to minimize risk-return trade-offs

entities.name: UN-PUDDLED MACHINE TRANSPLANTING
entities.description: A climate-smart rice cultivation technique used to minimize risk-return trade-offs

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A major agricultural crop mentioned in the context of machine transplanting

entities.name: FARMING SYSTEMS RESILIENCE
entities.description: The capacity of agricultural systems to withstand and recover from climate-related shocks
